meta.event_id_scheme: BGL_2k (구조화 CSV / eventid_card 와 동일 번호체계)
meta.purpose: Drain/template-match 노드가 raw Content -> 정식 EventId 매핑에 참조하는 메타데이터
meta.match_guide: regex는 ^...$ 앵커, <*> -> (.*?) 비탐욕. 여러 템플릿이 매칭되면 literal_len 큰(가장 구체적인) 쪽 우선 선택. 매칭 0건이면 unknown 처리.
meta.warning: 전체 BGL_templates.csv(377종)는 EventId 번호체계가 2k와 달라 (15/15 alert mismatch) 사용 금지. 반드시 2k 기준 EventId 사용.

templates.event_template: <*> ddr error(s) detected and corrected on rank <*>, symbol <*> over <*> seconds
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ ddr\ error\(s\)\ detected\ and\ corrected\ on\ rank\ (.*?),\ symbol\ (.*?)\ over\ (.*?)\ seconds$

templates.event_template: <*> ddr errors(s) detected and corrected on rank <*>, symbol <*>, bit <*>
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ ddr\ errors\(s\)\ detected\ and\ corrected\ on\ rank\ (.*?),\ symbol\ (.*?),\ bit\ (.*?)$

templates.event_template: <*> double-hummer alignment exceptions
<*> floating point alignment exceptions
<*> L3 EDRAM error(s) (dcr <*>) detected and corrected
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ L3\ EDRAM\ error\(s\)\ \(dcr\ (.*?)\)\ detected\ and\ corrected$

templates.event_template: <*> L3 EDRAM error(s) (dcr <*>) detected and corrected over <*> seconds
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ L3\ EDRAM\ error\(s\)\ \(dcr\ (.*?)\)\ detected\ and\ corrected\ over\ (.*?)\ seconds$

templates.event_template: <*> microseconds spent in the rbs signal handler during <*> calls. <*> microseconds was the maximum time for a single instance of a correctable ddr.
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ microseconds\ spent\ in\ the\ rbs\ signal\ handler\ during\ (.*?)\ calls\.\ (.*?)\ microseconds\ was\ the\ maximum\ time\ for\ a\ single\ instance\ of\ a\ correctable\ ddr\.$

templates.event_template: <*> torus receiver x+ input pipe error(s) (dcr <*>) detected and corrected
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ torus\ receiver\ x\+\ input\ pipe\ error\(s\)\ \(dcr\ (.*?)\)\ detected\ and\ corrected$

templates.event_template: <*> torus receiver y+ input pipe error(s) (dcr <*>) detected and corrected
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ torus\ receiver\ y\+\ input\ pipe\ error\(s\)\ \(dcr\ (.*?)\)\ detected\ and\ corrected$

templates.event_template: <*> torus receiver z+ input pipe error(s) (dcr <*>) detected and corrected
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ torus\ receiver\ z\+\ input\ pipe\ error\(s\)\ \(dcr\ (.*?)\)\ detected\ and\ corrected$

templates.event_template: <*> torus sender z- retransmission error(s) (dcr <*>) detected and corrected over <*> seconds
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ torus\ sender\ z\-\ retransmission\ error\(s\)\ \(dcr\ (.*?)\)\ detected\ and\ corrected\ over\ (.*?)\ seconds$

templates.event_template: <*> total interrupts. 0 critical input interrupts. <*> microseconds total spent on critical input interrupts, <*> microseconds max time in a critical input interrupt.
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ total\ interrupts\.\ 0\ critical\ input\ interrupts\.\ (.*?)\ microseconds\ total\ spent\ on\ critical\ input\ interrupts,\ (.*?)\ microseconds\ max\ time\ in\ a\ critical\ input\ interrupt\.$

templates.event_template: <*> tree receiver <*> in re-synch state event(s) (dcr <*>) detected
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ tree\ receiver\ (.*?)\ in\ re\-synch\ state\ event\(s\)\ \(dcr\ (.*?)\)\ detected$

templates.event_template: <*> tree receiver <*> in re-synch state event(s) (dcr <*>) detected over <*> seconds
templates.regex: ^(.*?)\ tree\ receiver\ (.*?)\ in\ re\-synch\ state\ event\(s\)\ \(dcr\ (.*?)\)\ detected\ over\ (.*?)\ seconds$

ciod: Missing or invalid fields on line <*> of node map file /<*>

templates.event_template: Node card is not fully functional

Node card status: ALERT <*>, ALERT <*>, ALERT <*>, ALERT <*> is (are) active. Clock Mode is Low. Clock Select is Midplane. Phy JTAG Reset is asserted. ASIC JTAG Reset is not asserted. Temperature Mask is not active. No temperature error. Temperature Limit Error Latch is clear. PGOOD is asserted. PGOOD error latch is clear. MPGOOD is OK. MPGOOD error latch is clear. The <*>.<*> volt rail is OK. The <*>.<*> volt rail is OK.
templates.regex: ^Node\ card\ status:\ ALERT\ (.*?),\ ALERT\ (.*?),\ ALERT\ (.*?),\ ALERT\ (.*?)\ is\ \(are\)\ active\.\ Clock\ Mode\ is\ Low\.\ Clock\ Select\ is\ Midplane\.\ Phy\ JTAG\ Reset\ is\ asserted\.\ ASIC\ JTAG\ Reset\ is\ not\ asserted\.\ Temperature\ Mask\ is\ not\ active\.\ No\ temperature\ error\.\ Temperature\ Limit\ Error\ Latch\ is\ clear\.\ PGOOD\ is\ asserted\.\ PGOOD\ error\ latch\ is\ clear\.\ MPGOOD\ is\ OK\.\ MPGOOD\ error\ latch\ is\ clear\.\ The\ (.*?)\.(.*?)\ volt\ rail\ is\ OK\.\ The\ (.*?)\.(.*?)\ volt\ rail\ is\ OK\.$

templates.event_template: Node card status: no ALERTs are active. Clock Mode is Low. Clock Select is Midplane. Phy JTAG Reset is asserted. ASIC JTAG Reset is asserted. Temperature Mask is not active. No temperature error. Temperature Limit Error Latch is clear. PGOOD IS NOT ASSERTED. PGOOD ERROR LATCH IS ACTIVE. MPGOOD IS NOT OK. MPGOOD ERROR LATCH IS ACTIVE. The <*>.<*> volt rail is OK. The <*>.<*> volt rail is OK.
templates.regex: ^Node\ card\ status:\ no\ ALERTs\ are\ active\.\ Clock\ Mode\ is\ Low\.\ Clock\ Select\ is\ Midplane\.\ Phy\ JTAG\ Reset\ is\ asserted\.\ ASIC\ JTAG\ Reset\ is\ asserted\.\ Temperature\ Mask\ is\ not\ active\.\ No\ temperature\ error\.\ Temperature\ Limit\ Error\ Latch\ is\ clear\.\ PGOOD\ IS\ NOT\ ASSERTED\.\ PGOOD\ ERROR\ LATCH\ IS\ ACTIVE\.\ MPGOOD\ IS\ NOT\ OK\.\ MPGOOD\ ERROR\ LATCH\ IS\ ACTIVE\.\ The\ (.*?)\.(.*?)\ volt\ rail\ is\ OK\.\ The\ (.*?)\.(.*?)\ volt\ rail\ is\ OK\.$

templates.event_template: Node card VPD check: U<*> node in processor card slot J<*> do not match. VPD ecid <*>, found <*>
templates.regex: ^Node\ card\ VPD\ check:\ U(.*?)\ node\ in\ processor\ card\ slot\ J(.*?)\ do\ not\ match\.\ VPD\ ecid\ (.*?),\ found\ (.*?)$

templates.event_template: NodeCard is not fully functional
PrepareForService shutting down Node card(mLctn(<*>), mCardSernum(<*>), mLp(<*>), mIp(<*>), mType(<*>)) as part of Service Action <*>
templates.regex: ^PrepareForService\ shutting\ down\ Node\ card\(mLctn\((.*?)\),\ mCardSernum\((.*?)\),\ mLp\((.*?)\),\ mIp\((.*?)\),\ mType\((.*?)\)\)\ as\ part\ of\ Service\ Action\ (.*?)$

templates.event_template: PrepareForService shutting down NodeCard(mLctn(<*>), mCardSernum(<*>), mLp(<*>), mIp(<*>), mType(<*>)) as part of Service Action <*>
templates.regex: ^PrepareForService\ shutting\ down\ NodeCard\(mLctn\((.*?)\),\ mCardSernum\((.*?)\),\ mLp\((.*?)\),\ mIp\((.*?)\),\ mType\((.*?)\)\)\ as\ part\ of\ Service\ Action\ (.*?)$
